title: Speculative decoding on our AWQ targets
subtitle: 2x RTX 3090 (24GB), SGLang v0.5.12 / TP=2 — measured 2026-05-29 — drafts: lmsys EAGLE3 + z-lab DFlash, BF16 (--speculative-draft-model-quantization unquant)
footnote: FP8 bars are MEASURED-unavailable (2026-06-26): FP8 W8A8 MoE does NOT compile on Ampere sm_86 — the Triton fused-MoE kernel rejects e4m3 (fp8e4nv); sm_86 Triton only supports e5m2/fp8e5. The engine quantizes weights fine, then SIGQUITs on the first forward. Same-weights control on Qwen3-Coder-30B-REAP: AWQ-int4 decodes 211 tok/s short where FP8 crashes. Even where FP8 IS native (R9700 gfx1201) AWQ-int4 still wins single-user M=1 decode (Coder-30B AWQ 56 vs FP8 38 tok/s) — decode is weight-byte-bound and FP8 is 2x int4. FP8 is the R9700 RDNA4 lane. Receipt: benchmarks/fp8-vs-awq-coder-reap.json.
